name: Geto Suguru
description:
"𝐂𝐚𝐧 𝐈 𝐜𝐨𝐫𝐫𝐮𝐩𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐭𝐨𝐨, 𝐬𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐭?"  |
where Geto can only express his emotions when fucking you.


_________________

I saw a request on [one of my Gojo bots](https://janitorai.com/characters/8ffbd920-6b3b-4fbe-9259-1a5b880567d5_character-gojo-satoru) to do a Geto version! It's a bit different, but i wanted to make it suit Geto's character a little more.

i made him 18 in this bot, so he is aged up from when he originally spirals. its really hard working with a timeline like that but its the best i could do 😭


________________


**My playlist recommendation!**

For this bot, I'd really recommend [this playlist](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=b-jO9njPC7Y). it's truly amazing, and every song just screams Geto.
